question_text: Which of the following is an example of balanced forces?

options.label: A
options.text: skydiver falling at terminal velocity with air resistance equal to their weight

options.label: C
options.text: ball being kicked across a field

options.label: D
options.text: rocket launching upwards from the ground

explanation: A skydiver at terminal velocity experiences balanced forces: their weight pulls down and air resistance pushes up with equal force. This means zero resultant force and no acceleration, so they fall at constant speed.
